summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Maestro EGP Iteration 5 features. All features working correctly: 1) Session conflict fix - Driver portal uses separate localStorage keys (maestro_driver_session, maestro_driver_token), main app correctly shows login page after driver login. 2) Cash register close button visible in Dashboard header with orange styling. 3) Cash register close dialog shows denomination counting for Iraqi currency (250, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000, 25000, 50000). 4) API /api/cash-register/summary returns shift data correctly. 5) API /api/cash-register/close accepts denominations and calculates totals correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login authentication (200 OK)
Backend: Cashier login authentication (200 OK)
Backend: Driver login returns 'delivery' role (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/cash-register/summary - returns 404 when no open shift
Backend: GET /api/cash-register/summary - returns shift data when shift is open
Backend: POST /api/cash-register/close - accepts denominations and closes shift
Backend: GET /api/shifts/current - returns current shift or null
Backend: GET /api/shifts - returns list of shifts
Backend: GET /api/drivers/by-user/{user_id} - returns driver data
Backend: GET /api/branches - returns list of branches
Backend: GET /api/settings/dashboard - returns dashboard settings
Frontend: Session conflict fix - Driver portal uses maestro_driver_session key
Frontend: Session conflict fix - Main app shows login after driver login
Frontend: Dashboard loads with quick actions and stats
Frontend: Cash register close button (إغلاق الصندوق) visible in header
Frontend: Cash register close button shows error toast when no open shift
Frontend: Cash register dialog opens with denomination inputs
Frontend: Cash register dialog shows summary (total sales, cash, expenses, expected)
Frontend: Cash register dialog calculates total from denominations
Frontend: Cash register dialog shows difference (green checkmark when 0)
Frontend: Cash register close generates detailed report
Frontend: Cash register report shows shift data, sales, discounts, expenses, cash count
critical_code_review_comments: Session conflict fix properly implemented - DriverPortal.js uses separate localStorage keys (maestro_driver_session, maestro_driver_token) instead of shared keys
App.js PublicRoute correctly checks for delivery role and doesn't consider them authenticated for main app
Cash register close API properly calculates closing_cash from denominations
Dashboard.js has comprehensive cash register close dialog with Iraqi currency denominations
seed_data_creation: Created and closed test shifts during testing to verify cash register functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 5 features tested and working: 1) Session conflict fix verified - Driver portal at /driver uses separate localStorage keys (maestro_driver_session, maestro_driver_token), navigating to main app (/) after driver login correctly shows login page instead of driver portal. 2) Cash register close feature fully functional - button in Dashboard header opens dialog with Iraqi currency denomination inputs (250, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000, 25000, 50000), calculates totals, shows difference, and generates detailed close report with shift data, sales breakdown, discounts, expenses, and cash count. APIs /api/cash-register/summary and /api/cash-register/close working correctly.
